currentState: Checkpoint friction turned functional respect. Falric starts as protocol barrier and ends as the officer who understands she was right to force the issue.
powerDynamic: Falric controls access to Arthas; Sylvanas controls the urgency that makes his control untenable.

physicalDynamics.pattern: He blocks the road in polished plate; she answers by leaning harder into command pressure instead of diplomacy until he steps aside.

nameUsage.falricCallsSylvanas: Begins with my lady and shifts into formal rank once her identity lands.
nameUsage.sylvanasCallsFalric: Treats him as captain and obstacle, not peer.

history.event: Their only chapter-11 interaction is enough to define the pair: Falric tests the interruption against protocol and yields once he realizes the plague warning is already inside his camp.
